title: DataCoolie Metadata
description: Metadata definition for the DataCoolie ETL framework. Defines connections, dataflows, sources, destinations, and transforms.

$schema.description: Reference to the DataCoolie metadata JSON Schema for IDE validation and autocomplete.

connections.description: Endpoint configurations for data sources and destinations.

dataflows.description: ETL pipeline definitions composing source, destination, and transform.

schema_hints.description: Shared schema hints that apply across dataflows. Matched by connection_name + table_name.

Connection.description: An endpoint: file root, lakehouse path, RDBMS, REST API, or Python function.

name.description: Unique connection identifier. Used as connection_id via name_to_uuid.

connection_type.description: Connection endpoint category. Auto-derived from format if omitted.

catalog.description: Catalog name for Unity Catalog or Iceberg catalogs.

configure.description: Type-specific settings. Structure depends on connection_type. Common fields below; type-specific fields added conditionally.

read_options.description: Engine-specific read options (e.g. header, inferSchema, delimiter).

use_schema_hint.description: Apply schema hints from transform. Set false to skip type casting.

backward_closing_day.description: Look-back closing day for watermark value.

backward.description: Nested backward config: {days, months, hours, years, closing_day}.

secrets_ref.description: Map of secret source to list of configure fields to resolve. Outer key is the vault identifier (ARN, Key Vault URL, or empty string for env vars).

backward_closing_day.description: Look-back closing day for watermark value.

backward.description: Nested backward look-back config. Keys: days, months, hours, years, closing_day. Overrides connection-level setting.

athena_output_location.description: S3 path for Athena DDL results. Triggers Glue catalog registration.

register_symlink_table.description: Register SymlinkTextInputFormat table in Glue. Implies generate_manifest.

symlink_database_prefix.description: Prefix for symlink Glue database name.

auth_type.description: Authentication method. For service_principal: username=client_id, password=client_secret.

username.description: Database username or SPN client_id (env var placeholder for secrets_ref).

password.description: Database password or SPN client_secret (env var placeholder for secrets_ref).

tenant_id.description: Azure AD tenant ID (required for service_principal auth).

token.description: Pre-fetched access token (required for access_token auth).

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds (int or float).

api_key_header.description: Header name for API key auth.

api_key_value.description: API key value (or env var placeholder).

default_headers.description: Static headers added to every request.

token_request_body_format.description: OAuth2 token request body encoding format.

token_request_extras.description: Extra fields sent in the OAuth2 token request body.

aws_region.description: AWS region for SigV4 authentication (e.g. us-east-1).

aws_service.description: AWS service name for SigV4 auth (e.g. execute-api).

aws_access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID for SigV4 (or env var placeholder).

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for SigV4 (or env var placeholder).

aws_session_token.description: AWS session token for SigV4 temporary credentials (or env var placeholder).

DataFlow.description: Complete ETL pipeline configuration composing source, destination, and transform.

name.description: Unique dataflow name. Used to derive dataflow_id.

stage.description: Stage grouping (e.g. source2bronze, bronze2silver). Used by driver.run(stage=...).

group_number.description: Execution group. Dataflows in the same group run in parallel.

execution_order.description: Order within group. Lower values execute first.

Source.description: Read-side pipeline configuration. References a connection by name.

connection_name.description: Name of the connection to read from.

table.description: Table or object name to read.

query.description: SQL query (alternative to table for database sources).

python_function.description: Dotted path to a Python function for function sources (e.g. functions.sources.my_fn).

watermark_columns.description: Columns used for incremental reads (watermark filtering).

filter_expression.description: SQL WHERE predicate applied after watermark filter on raw source columns.

configure.description: Source-level configuration. API fields documented from api_reader.py.

backward_days.description: Subtract N days from watermark for partition look-back. Overrides connection-level setting.

backward_months.description: Subtract N months from watermark for partition look-back. Overrides connection-level setting.

backward_hours.description: Subtract N hours from watermark for partition look-back. Overrides connection-level setting.

backward_years.description: Subtract N years from watermark for partition look-back. Overrides connection-level setting.

backward_closing_day.description: Day-of-month for closing-day look-back strategy. Overrides connection-level setting.

backward.description: Nested backward look-back config. Keys: days, months, hours, years, closing_day. Overrides connection-level setting.

endpoint.description: API endpoint path appended to base_url.

params.description: Static query parameters added to every request.

data_path.description: Dot-separated path to the records array in the response JSON (e.g. 'data.items'). Defaults to root-level list.

pagination_type.description: Pagination strategy. Omit for single-page fetch.

max_pages.description: Safety limit on total pages fetched.

next_link_path.description: Dot-separated path to the next-page URL in the response (next_link pagination).

cursor_path.description: Dot-separated path to the cursor token in the response (cursor pagination).

cursor_param.description: Query parameter name for cursor value.

offset_param.description: Query parameter name for page offset.

limit_param.description: Query parameter name for page size.

total_path.description: Dot-separated path to total record count in first-page response (e.g. 'meta.total'). Enables concurrent offset fetching when set.

offset_max_workers.description: Max parallel workers for concurrent offset pagination (requires total_path).

rate_limit_delay.description: Seconds to wait between sequential page requests.

max_retries.description: Max retries on HTTP 429 responses. Uses Retry-After header or exponential backoff.

watermark_param_mapping.description: Maps watermark_columns entries to API parameter names (e.g. {'updated_at': 'updated_since'}). Pushes watermark server-side instead of filtering in memory.

watermark_to_param.description: API parameter name to receive the current timestamp as upper bound ('to' side of the window).

watermark_param_location.description: Where to inject watermark values: URL query string or request body.

watermark_param_format.description: Serialisation format for watermark values sent to the API.

watermark_to_param_timezone.description: Timezone for the 'now' upper-bound timestamp (IANA name or ±HH:MM offset). Overrides connection-level default.

watermark_range_interval_unit.description: Splits the watermark window into sub-ranges of this unit and fetches concurrently. Requires watermark_to_param.

watermark_range_interval_amount.description: Number of units per sub-range interval (e.g. 3 with unit='hour' → 3-hour windows).

watermark_range_start.description: ISO-8601 fallback lower bound for the first run when no stored watermark exists. Required when watermark_range_interval_unit is set.

watermark_range_max_workers.description: Max parallel HTTP workers for range-split fetching.

watermark_range_to_exclusive_offset.description: Epsilon subtracted from each range upper-bound before sending to the API. Use when API has inclusive BETWEEN semantics to prevent duplicates.

Destination.description: Write-side pipeline configuration. References a connection by name.

connection_name.description: Name of the connection to write to.

merge_keys.description: Key columns for merge operations (merge_upsert, merge_overwrite, scd2).

partition_columns.description: Partition columns for the destination table.

scd2_effective_column.description: SQL expression used as __valid_from for SCD2 loads.

replace_by_watermark.description: Use range-based window replace instead of key-based delete for merge_overwrite.

partition_columns.description: Alternative location for partition columns (lifted to top level).

Transform.description: Transformation rules applied between source read and destination write.

latest_data_columns.description: Columns used to pick the latest row when deduplicating.

filter_expression.description: SQL WHERE predicate applied after computed columns (transformer order 35).

additional_columns.description: Computed columns added during transform phase.

schema_hints.description: Column-level type hints for schema conversion.

deduplicate_by_rank.description: Use RANK-based dedup instead of ROW_NUMBER.

SchemaHint.description: Column-level type hint for schema conversion.

data_type.description: Target data type (e.g. int, string, decimal, timestamp, date, boolean, float, double, long, short, byte).

PartitionColumn.description: Partition column definition with optional derived expression.

expression.description: SQL expression to derive the partition value (e.g. year(event_date)).

AdditionalColumn.description: Computed column added during the transform phase.

expression.description: SQL expression to compute the column value.

SharedSchemaHint.description: Shared schema hints scoped to a connection + table. Applied by the metadata provider to matching dataflows.

connection_name.description: Connection name this hint set applies to.

table_name.description: Table name this hint set applies to.

schema_name.description: Optional schema namespace to narrow hint matching to a specific schema.
